channel.title: 最新限免 / 促销应用
channel.description: GoFans：最新限免 / 促销应用 - Made with love by RSSHub(https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub)

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」VoxSyn Pro
item.description:
原价：¥50.00 -> 现价：¥25.00
平台：iOS
VoxSyn Pro turns your voice into the most flexible vocal sound generator ever. Instantly following even subtle modulations of pitch and spectral changes of your voice VoxSyn Pro creates signature vocal sounds far beyond traditional vocoding. Talk or sing into the microphone and you’ll trigger var

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」VoxSyn
item.description:
原价：¥18.00 -> 现价：¥12.00
平台：iOS
VoxSyn turns your voice into the most flexible vocal sound generator ever. Instantly following even subtle modulations of pitch and spectral changes of your voice VoxSyn creates signature vocal sounds far beyond traditional vocoding. Talk or sing into the microphone and you’ll trigger various syn

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Arpeggist
item.description:
原价：¥50.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Arpeggist is a MIDI Note arpeggiator with a very flexible step matrix editor for programming and a unique “rolling dice” random arpeggio generator. You can build arpeggios from scratch or use one of the factory arpeggios as foundation. You can also create an unlimited number of user arpeggio presets

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Tera Synth
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Tera Synth - Modular Analog Synthesizer Explore new sound spaces with Tera Synth that go beyond the emulation of synthesizer legends. Use the power of analog and digital synthesis combined with new modules for physical modelling. Wireless patching of modules combined with an intelligible modulation

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」microTERA
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥25.00
平台：iOS
Waveshaping Synthesis is a type of distortion synthesis that can create dynamic spectra in a controlled way. In waveshaping, it is possible to change the spectrum with the amplitude of the sound. A simple example of this method is the clipping caused by overdriving an audio amplifier. These simple

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Cube Synth
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Cube Synth is a groundbreaking new software instrument giving you the power and flexibility of additive synthesis together with easy editing and morphing capabilities. Macro parameters allow you to control this beast with unequalled ease. Intelligent sound morphing capabilities enables you to easil

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」AudioReverb
item.description:
原价：¥45.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Studio quality reverb for AUv3 compatible hosts / Audiobus / Inter-app audio and songs from your iTunes music library. AudioReverb is an algorithmic reverberation app which combines the flexibility of vintage algorithmic reverbs with the sonic quality of convolution based reverbs.   The creation o

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Harmony Voice
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥30.00
平台：iOS
Transform your voice into a choir with up to four voices ! Harmony Voice is a pitch shifter and harmonizer with professional features including automatic tuning correction. A realtime visual intonation-display gives you feedback of the tunes you sing. You can sing and Harmony voice will add up to

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iVoxel
item.description:
原价：¥45.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
iVoxel is not only an amazingly sounding vocoder - the unique concept of iVoxel turns this vocoder into a singing machine. iVoxel is a combination of a voice optimized synthesizer and a vocoder. The vocoder part is based on the Matrix vocoder from VirSyn used by many famous artists - one of them the

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Matrix Vocoder
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥30.00
平台：iOS
Matrix Vocoder transforms your voice into an electronic instrument! The Vocoder was invented by Homer Dudley in the mid-30's of the last century. Dudley worked at Bell Laboratories, and this is where the first Vocoder took shape. The Matrix Vocoder is designed to properly simulate the classic analo

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」AudioLayer
item.description:
原价：¥198.00 -> 现价：¥93.00
平台：iOS
AudioLayer satisfies the most sought after gap for contemporary music production on iOS devices. AudioLayer is a full featured open standard audio multi-sampler pushing the boundaries beyond what has been available even in the desktop music production worlds. And all this integrated in all relevant

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Harmony Eight
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥30.00
平台：iOS
Up to eight pitch shifted voices are created from vocal input or instruments. Separate algorithms for optimal shifting of vocals/monophonic instruments and for any other kind of audio. Position each voice in space ( left and right / front and back ) Modify the voice character from male to female

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」ReSlice
item.description:
原价：¥78.00 -> 现价：¥40.00
平台：iOS
Audio Slice Machine Slice your audio samples with ReSlice and create flexible musical atoms which can be triggered by MIDI notes or the touch of your fingers. The polyrhythm Arpeggiator redefines the art of creating new loops from the extracted slices. Record live or import audio from clipboard o

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Addictive Pro
item.description:
原价：¥78.00 -> 现价：¥45.00
平台：iOS
The hybrid synthesis algorithm on which Addictive Pro is based provides you with efficient means for easy control of complex sounds far beyond usual sound synthesis methods: Addictive Pro provides you a with unique form of Wavetable oscillators. These Wavetables are generated from the harmonic cont

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Poseidon Synth
item.description:
原价：¥98.00 -> 现价：¥45.00
平台：iOS
Poseidon Synth - The Ocean of Sound For all creatures in the ocean of sound - Sonic textures from other worlds, Analog signature sounds,  Cut-through-the-mix leads and silkily smooth pads: Poseidon sets a new standard for sound design and ease of use. All of this was made possible through a combina

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Emo Chorus
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥12.00
平台：iOS
Realistic Choir simulator ranging from simple Chorus emulation to full ensemble Choir with 128 members. Emo Chorus is a modulation effect used used to create a richer, thicker sound and add subtle movement. The effect roughly simulates the slight variations in pitch and timing that occur when multi

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Tap Delay
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥25.00
平台：iOS
Back in the “old days”, producers and engineers created delay and echo effects using tape machines. Tap Delay combines the warm sound of vintage tape echo machines with a modern, step sequencer-like tapped delay engine which continues the tradition of the tape echo machines into the 21st century. T

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Model 15 Modular Synthesizer
item.description:
原价：¥198.00 -> 现价：¥98.00
平台：iOS
The Moog Model 15 App is the first Moog modular synthesizer and synthesis educational tool created exclusively for iPad, iPhone and iPod touch. Each facet of the Moog Model 15 modular synthesizer has been meticulously recreated in this application to ensure the power and transcendent sound quality

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」My PaintBrush Pro: 画画和照片编辑
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：macOS
My PaintBrush Pro是一款多层处理的绘图软件, 它利用丰富的工具和画笔来绘制你流畅的图像效果。   My PaintBrush Pro的功能特色：   √ 拥有超过100种类型的画笔:  • 铅笔：6种  • 画笔：16种  • 笔刷：25种   • 喷枪：11种   • 装饰笔：25种   • 特效笔：19种   • 橡皮擦：​​4种类型    √ 可以调整笔刷的  • 透明度  • 压感  • 半径  • 硬度   √ 建立多层及多层处理：  • 合并图层。  • 设置单独的层的alpha值。  • 自定义图层是可见或不可见。  • 随意更改图层的顺序。  • 删除不需

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」度量衡单位换算器
item.description:
原价：¥6.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
全功能度量衡单位换算器 目前最齐全好用的单位转换应用，30种分类，700多种单位换算，公制、英制、美制单位全面囊括。 √ 30种分类 √ 700多种单位 √ 全高清设计 √ 退位按钮 √ 简单易用 √ 支持深色模式 度量衡单位换算器 URL scheme is "EWUnitConverterPro://"
